title: Dexcom to Host Investor Day on June 23, 2023
text: SAN DIEGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ:DXCM) today announced that it will host an Investor Day on June 23rd from 2:30 PM until approximately 5:00 PM PST (5:30 PM – 8:00 PM EST). The event will include presentations from Dexcom management highlighting the company's market opportunities, business strategy, innovation efforts, and long-term financial outlook.
